query:
DELETE FROM rss_sources WHERE name = 'VOA 中文';
SELECT name, url FROM rss_sources ORDER BY country, name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2T8Yuzty3NAouPd.b9d024491cfd --database e62Q4utoyfc8BuJjv96dsP --execute DELETE FROM rss_sources WHERE name = 'VOA 中文';
SELECT name, url FROM rss_sources ORDER BY country, name;
